case_title: ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES VS SOLOMON NEAL E.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOLOMON NEAL E. $2,378.97 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,424.47 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RESET AS TO DEFENDANT SOLOMON NEAL E. HEARING SET FOR JAN-27-1993 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JAN-27-1993, NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUED FOR LETTER FROM JAN-27-1993 TO FEB-10-1993 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05 AS TO DEFENDANT SOLOMON NEAL E.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JAN-10-1993 AS TO DEFENDANT SOLOMON NEAL E.
NOT. OF FAILURE TO APPEAR FOR O E X TO DEFEND. RETURNED.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SOLOMON NEAL E.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT SOLOMON NEAL E. HEARING SET FOR AUG-05-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,378.97 FILED BY ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT SOLOMON NEAL E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SOLOMON NEAL E.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RESET AS TO DEFENDANT SOLOMON NEAL E. HEARING SET FOR DEC-07-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF FEB-10-1993, NO APPEARANCE, ORDER OF ARREST TO ISSUE, BAIL $500.00, AS TO DEFENDANT SOLOMON NEAL E.
